current_wind.description: Light breeze from the South-Southeast (162°), with gusts up to 14.1 mph.

wind_info.description: Light crosswind from the left (3 o'clock position) with potential for moderate gusts.

bh.shot_strategy: Play a hyzer to fight the wind pushing from left to right. Aim slightly left of the basket.

fh.shot_strategy: Throw with a slight anhyzer to counter the wind's push from the left. Aim for a smooth flex line.

bh.shot_strategy: Avoid this throw type due to your natural fade and the opposing wind. Prefer an FH shot.

fh.shot_strategy: Throw with a slight anhyzer to counter the wind. Aim for a controlled flight.

wind_info.description: Light headwind from the 12 o'clock position.

bh.shot_strategy: Use an overstable disc to fight the headwind. Aim for a straight, stable flight.

fh.shot_strategy: An overstable disc will resist the headwind well. Focus on a clean release.

wind_info.description: Moderate crosswind from the right (10 o'clock position).

bh.shot_strategy: Wind pushing left will expose the flight plate. Prefer an RHFH. Throw an overstable disc for control.

fh.shot_strategy: Use an overstable disc and aim to fade into the wind. Focus on a clean release.

bh.shot_strategy: Your natural fade to the right works with the wind pushing left. Use a stable disc for a controlled flight.

fh.shot_strategy: Throw with a slight anhyzer to control the flight path. Aim for a smooth landing.
